$schema_note: RDR-007 §4 golden conformance fixture — the classify-outcome rule. CROSS-HOST: consumed by BOTH the TS host (classifyOutcome, dispatch.ts) and the Python host (classify_outcome, run_arm.py). These are verbatim ports of one rule; this fixture is the cross-language drift tripwire (RDR-007 Consequence Negative-1). `turnsUsed: null` means the signal was not supplied (TS: undefined / omitted; Python: turns_used=None).
rule: rc != 0 (or null) -> error; else turnsUsed >= maxTurns -> turn_limit; else completed. The wall-clock `timeout` outcome is owned by the runner, NOT this rule.

cases.name: one under the turn limit completes
turns absent completes on zero exit
